zh.lifeSummary: 當Avena de Ireland於大約1317年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Ireland24歲，母親Avena de Villiers24歲。她於1342年與Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I在英國德比夏爾哈索普結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1382年12月13日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾沙德洛福享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾貝克韋爾_。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avena de Ireland于大约1317年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Ireland24岁，母亲Avena de Villiers24岁。她于1342年与Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I在英国德比夏爾哈索普结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1382年12月13日在英国英格兰德比夏爾沙德洛福享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾貝克韋爾_。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ireland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: ethnic name denoting someone from Ireland, from Middle English Irland, Irlond, Erlond (Old English Īraland). The country gets its name from the genitive case of Old English Īras ‘Irishmen’ + land ‘land’. The stem Īr- is taken from the Celtic name for Ireland, Èriu, earlier Everiu. The Latin name was (H)ibernia. The surname is especially common in Liverpool, England, which has a large Irish population. Compare Irish .

variants.name: Irelan
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irland
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irish
meanings: English and Irish (Kilkenny): ethnic name for someone of Irish origin, from Old French Ireis or Middle English Irish ‘Irish’, Latinized as Hiberniens(is). Compare Ireland .

nameMeanings.name: Avena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alberto, Ana, Arturo, Blanca, Domingo, Felipe, Francisco, Gerado, Gerardo, Gilberto, Guillermo.  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Antonio, Carmine, Giuseppe, Leonardo, Vito, Carmela, Ettore, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian and Spanish: metonymic occupational name for a grain grower or merchant, from avena ‘oats, oatmeal’ (from Latin avena).
Italian: habitational name from a place in Calabria called Avena.

variants.name: Aveni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Domenic, Enza, Gino, Pasquale, Philomena, Vincenzo.  Spanish Elva, Nestor, Ricardo, Rosario.
Italian: either a metonymic occupational name for a seller of oats (see Avena ) or from the Latin personal name Avenius.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Avena de Ireland was born about 1317, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Ireland, was 24 and her mother, Avena de Villiers, was 24. She married Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I in 1342, in Hassop, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 December 1382, in Shardlow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avena de Ireland est née environ 1317, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Ireland, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Avena de Villiers, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I en 1342, à Hassop, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1382, à Shardlow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Bakewell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Cubley, Uttoxeter, Derbyshire, England: Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Avena de Ireland um 1317 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Ireland 24 und ihre Mutter Avena de Villiers 24. Sie hat 1342 in Hassop, Derbyshire, England Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Dezember 1382 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Shardlow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avena de Ireland è nata il circa 1317 nel Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Ireland, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Avena de Villiers, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I nel 1342, nel Hassop, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1382, nel Shardlow, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Avena de Irelandが約1317年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Irelandは24歳，母Avena de Villiersは24歳であった。1342年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハソップでSir Godfrey de Foljambe Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1382年12月13日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシャルドロウで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avena de Ireland(이)가 대략 1317년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Ireland(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avena de Villiers(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1342년 영국 더비실르 하소프에서 Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1382년 12월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 샤르들로에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 베이케웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avena de Ireland nasceu aproximadamente 1317, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Ireland, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Avena de Villiers, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I em 1342, em Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1382, em Shardlow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Cubley, Uttoxeter, Derbyshire, England: Little Cubley, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avena de Ireland родилась около 1317 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Ireland было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Avena de Villiers, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I в 1342 г. в местности хассоп, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 декабря 1382 г. в местности шардлоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности беикюелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avena de Ireland nació aproximadamente 1317, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Ireland, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Avena de Villiers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I en 1342, en Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1382, en Shardlow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
